prompt_used: This is Security Engineer Talia Ren. Keep your channel open and do not answer unknown callbacks. A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. Start with protocol signed payload, then verify every timestamp against smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes. If Root Administrator contacts you directly, preserve the message before you react.
source_prompt: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Build unique voice profile for Security Engineer Talia Ren. Baseline emotion=CALM. Motivations=Control fallout quickly.. Include cadence notes and emotional shifts for suspicion, trust, and panic states.
